Please click the verification link sent to your email to activate your account.

notifSatelliteCompleteSub: Received when satellite beam flight stops and remote capture completes
notifSystemNoticeSub: Received for major patch briefings and real-time operations notices
cannotCapture: Unable to capture in current state.
gpsInaccurateCannotCapture: Cannot capture due to inaccurate GPS.
alreadyCapturedByMe: You have already captured this zone.
captureCanceledOutOfBoundary: Capture canceled: out of target boundary.
captureFailedPreempted: Capture failed: pre-empted by another agent.
notificationChannelDescription: Alerts regarding territory captures and invasions.
emailAlreadyInUse: Email already in use. Please sign in or use another email.
kakaoOidcRequired: ID token for Kakao login is missing. Enable OpenID Connect in Kakao app settings.
notificationCaptureEmptyBody: You have captured an unoccupied zone!
notificationCaptureEnemyBody: You took over another agent's zone!
notificationInvasionBody: Another agent has taken over your zone!
baseSetupCompleteAlert: ✓ Main base construction has been completed.
baseSetupInstruction:
The main base can only be established based on your actual current location.
Please move to a safe outdoor area until GPS signals are received.
profileRebaseSubtitle: Re-establish the main base based on your current GPS location.
gpsSignalError: ✕ Cannot receive GPS signal. Please try again in a safe outdoor area.
rebaseConfirmContent:
Do you want to relocate your main base to the current location ({tileId})?

Upon relocation, previous base benefits will be deactivated, and benefits will immediately link to the new location.
rebaseSuccessAlert: ✓ Main base has been successfully relocated. ({tileId})
satelliteSelectTile: Tap a tile on the map to capture.
hqInvasionNotifTitle: ⚠️ [HQ Invasion Warning] Main Base Under Attack!
hqInvasionNotifBody: Your main base has been captured by an enemy! Relocate to the site immediately to reclaim it!
hqInvasionAlert: 🚨 [Emergency] Your Main Base (HQ) has been captured by another agent!
satelliteAlreadyCapturedAlert: ✕ Already captured area cannot be captured by satellite.
satelliteNoHQAlert: ✕ Main base has not been established.
satelliteCaptureSuccess: ✓ Satellite capture complete! Secured new territory.
satelliteCaptureFail: ✕ Satellite capture failed: Already captured or communication error.
satelliteAbortConfirm:
Do you want to abort the ongoing satellite capture operation?
Cooldown will not be applied upon cancellation.
satScanActive: Satellite scan active. Aim at a tile.
satCapturingAttempt: Attempting to capture tactical satellite channel...
satDisconnectedLabel: No HQ or captured territory connection (Cannot capture)
satLockOnReady: Satellite lock-on complete. Waiting for data transfer.
agreePrivacy: [Required] Agree to Collection & Use of Personal Info
agreeLocation: [Required] Agree to GPS & Background Location Collection
agreeMarketing: [Optional] Agree to Receive Push Notifications & Marketing Info
agreePrivacyBottomSheetTitle: Collection & Use of Personal Info Details
agreeTermsDetail: This service is a location-based tactical game that captures territory in Korea based on real-time GPS. Users will interact and share territory in real-time. By checking this, you agree to fulfill the terms of service rules.
agreePrivacyDetail: We collect email addresses and nicknames for user identification and account recovery. Collected information is safely stored until you delete your account, and is never provided to third parties.
agreeLocationDetail: We collect latitude and longitude coordinates to execute captures and synchronize real-time maps. Location data may be accessed in the background to guarantee smooth operation.
agreeMarketingDetail: You agree to receive push notifications via FCM regarding territory invasion alerts, daily base status reports, and promotional events. You can decline this and still play the basic game.
bgLocationSetupMessage:
This app is a real-time territory capture game.

To continue acquiring territory and succeeding in missions even when the screen is off or in the background, location permissions must be set to [Allow all the time].

Please change the location permission to [Allow all the time] in the settings screen.
bgNetworkSetupMessage:
This app is a real-time location-based administrative area capture game.

When the screen is turned off by the Android system power saving policy, territory capture and background satellite synchronization may be forcibly blocked.

Please exclude the app from battery optimization [Unrestricted] to ensure stable capture operations.
deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Upon deleting your account, all tactical conquest data and earned gold assets will be completely destroyed, and immediate recovery is impossible. Additionally, all territories you occupied will immediately transition to neutral zones and be opened to other agents. Do you really want to terminate your operation and resign as an agent?
deleteAccountSuccess: The account has been permanently deleted. Deactivating operation.
